description: Minimal golden test set for Modular RAG evaluation (debug mode).

test_cases.reference_answer: Modular RAG goes beyond naive RAG by adding specialized modules like search refinement, reranking, and query transformation...
To configure Azure OpenAI, you need to set the API_KEY, ENDPOINT, and DEPLOYMENT_NAME in the .env file...

test_cases.query: What is hybrid search and how does it work?
test_cases.reference_answer: Hybrid search combines vector-based semantic search with keyword-based BM25 search to improve retrieval accuracy...
The strategy involves fixed-size overlapping chunks to maintain context across boundaries...
Supported metrics include Hit Rate, MRR (Mean Reciprocal Rank), and Faithfulness for answer generation...
